CVE-2012-6702.title: Expat, when used in a parser that has not called XML_SetHashSalt  ...
CVE-2012-6702.summary: Expat, when used in a parser that has not called XML_SetHashSalt or passed it a seed of 0, makes it easier for context-dependent attackers to defeat cryptographic protection mechanisms via vectors involving use of the srand function.

CVE-2015-1283.title: Multiple integer overflows in the XML_GetBuffer function in Expat ...
CVE-2015-1283.summary: Multiple integer overflows in the XML_GetBuffer function in Expat through 2.1.0, as used in Google Chrome before 44.0.2403.89 and other products, allow remote attackers to cause a denial of service (heap-based buffer overflow) or possibly have unspecified other impact via crafted XML data, a related issue to CVE-2015-2716.

CVE-2016-0718.title: Expat allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of ser ...
CVE-2016-0718.summary: Expat allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) or possibly execute arbitrary code via a malformed input document, which triggers a buffer overflow.

CVE-2016-4472.title: The overflow protection in Expat is removed by compilers with cer ...
CVE-2016-4472.summary: The overflow protection in Expat is removed by compilers with certain optimization settings, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) or possibly execute arbitrary code via crafted XML data.  NOTE: this vulnerability exists because of an incomplete fix for CVE-2015-1283 and CVE-2015-2716.

CVE-2016-5300.title: The XML parser in Expat does not use sufficient entropy for hash  ...
CVE-2016-5300.summary: The XML parser in Expat does not use sufficient entropy for hash initialization, which allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (CPU consumption) via crafted identifiers in an XML document.  NOTE: this vulnerability exists because of an incomplete fix for CVE-2012-0876.

CVE-2018-20843.title: In libexpat in Expat before 2.2.7, XML input including XML names  ...
CVE-2018-20843.summary: In libexpat in Expat before 2.2.7, XML input including XML names that contain a large number of colons could make the XML parser consume a high amount of RAM and CPU resources while processing (enough to be usable for denial-of-service attacks).

CVE-2019-15903.title: In libexpat before 2.2.8, crafted XML input could fool the parser ...
CVE-2019-15903.summary: In libexpat before 2.2.8, crafted XML input could fool the parser into changing from DTD parsing to document parsing too early; a consecutive call to XML_GetCurrentLineNumber (or XML_GetCurrentColumnNumber) then resulted in a heap-based buffer over-read.

CVE-2021-45960.title: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, a left shift by 29 (or more ...
CVE-2021-45960.summary: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, a left shift by 29 (or more) places in the storeAtts function in xmlparse.c can lead to realloc misbehavior (e.g., allocating too few bytes, or only freeing memory).

CVE-2021-46143.title: In doProlog in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, a ...
CVE-2021-46143.summary: In doProlog in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3, an integer overflow exists for m_groupSize.

CVE-2022-22822.title: addBinding in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has ...
CVE-2022-22822.summary: addBinding in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has an integer overflow.

CVE-2022-22823.title: build_model in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 ha ...
CVE-2022-22823.summary: build_model in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has an integer overflow.

CVE-2022-22824.title: defineAttribute in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4. ...
CVE-2022-22824.summary: defineAttribute in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has an integer overflow.

CVE-2022-22825.summary: lookup in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has an integer overflow.

CVE-2022-22826.summary: nextScaffoldPart in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has an integer overflow.

CVE-2022-22827.title: storeAtts in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has  ...
CVE-2022-22827.summary: storeAtts in xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.3 has an integer overflow.

CVE-2022-25235.title: xmltok_impl.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5 lacks certain  ...
CVE-2022-25235.summary: xmltok_impl.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5 lacks certain validation of encoding, such as checks for whether a UTF-8 character is valid in a certain context.

CVE-2022-25236.title: xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5 allows attackers  ...
CVE-2022-25236.summary: xmlparse.c in Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5 allows attackers to insert namespace-separator characters into namespace URIs.

CVE-2022-25313.title: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5, an attacker can trigger sta ...
CVE-2022-25313.summary: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5, an attacker can trigger stack exhaustion in build_model via a large nesting depth in the DTD element.

CVE-2022-25314.title: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5, there is an integer overflo ...
CVE-2022-25314.summary: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5, there is an integer overflow in copyString.

CVE-2022-25315.title: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5, there is an integer overflo ...
CVE-2022-25315.summary: In Expat (aka libexpat) before 2.4.5, there is an integer overflow in storeRawNames.

CVE-2022-40674.title: libexpat before 2.4.9 has a use-after-free in the doContent funct ...
CVE-2022-40674.summary: libexpat before 2.4.9 has a use-after-free in the doContent function in xmlparse.c.

CVE-2022-43680.title: In libexpat through 2.4.9, there is a use-after free caused by ov ...
CVE-2022-43680.summary: In libexpat through 2.4.9, there is a use-after free caused by overeager destruction of a shared DTD in XML_ExternalEntityParserCreate in out-of-memory situations.

CVE-2023-52425.title: libexpat through 2.5.0 allows a denial of service (resource consu ...
CVE-2023-52425.summary: libexpat through 2.5.0 allows a denial of service (resource consumption) because many full reparsings are required in the case of a large token for which multiple buffer fills are needed.

CVE-2023-52426.title: libexpat through 2.5.0 allows recursive XML Entity Expansion if X ...
CVE-2023-52426.summary: libexpat through 2.5.0 allows recursive XML Entity Expansion if XML_DTD is undefined at compile time.

CVE-2024-28757.title: libexpat through 2.6.1 allows an XML Entity Expansion attack when ...
CVE-2024-28757.summary: libexpat through 2.6.1 allows an XML Entity Expansion attack when there is isolated use of external parsers (created via XML_ExternalEntityParserCreate).

CVE-2024-45490.title: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.3. xmlparse.c does ...
CVE-2024-45490.summary: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.3. xmlparse.c does not reject a negative length for XML_ParseBuffer.

CVE-2024-45491.title: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.3. dtdCopy in xmlp ...
CVE-2024-45491.summary: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.3. dtdCopy in xmlparse.c can have an integer overflow for nDefaultAtts on 32-bit platforms (where UINT_MAX equals SIZE_MAX).

CVE-2024-45492.title: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.3. nextScaffoldPar ...
CVE-2024-45492.summary: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.3. nextScaffoldPart in xmlparse.c can have an integer overflow for m_groupSize on 32-bit platforms (where UINT_MAX equals SIZE_MAX).

CVE-2024-50602.title: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.4. There is a cras ...
CVE-2024-50602.summary: An issue was discovered in libexpat before 2.6.4. There is a crash within the XML_ResumeParser function because XML_StopParser can stop/suspend an unstarted parser.

CVE-2024-8176.title: A stack overflow vulnerability exists in the libexpat library due ...
CVE-2024-8176.summary: A stack overflow vulnerability exists in the libexpat library due to the way it handles recursive entity expansion in XML documents. When parsing an XML document with deeply nested entity references, libexpat can be forced to recurse indefinitely, exhausting the stack space and causing a crash. This issue could lead to denial of service (DoS) or, in some cases, exploitable memory corruption, depending on the environment and library usage.
